betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Embracing the Mission.
Binding the Hungering Flesh.
Wielding Truth.
Accepting the wisdom of the Name of Names.
Clasping Worthiness.
Many acts of Ascension, all of which are now converging into a discovery. A terrible truth.
The knowledge of cruelty, one I never had the guts to speak out loud.
Facing the Meatball Man. Coming home. One and the same.
Because home is no more.
Because Earth is gone. The Meatball Man has unleashed the Hungering Flesh. On my home. On what used to be my home.
Humanity is gone. And I did nothing. And I did not even know.
My family. The ones I loved. All of humanity, known and unknown.
I do not even know how much time has passed since I came to Terra.
I was not there for it. I could do nothing about it.
I have power, and yet I was powerless to this.
Hollow. Void. Is this how I feel? No, I am lying to myself.
Even now, I tell myself I can rise above this.
Even now, I tell myself that I can face this challenge as a rightous and just person.
Even now, I tell myself that if I give in into vengeance, I will be no better than my enemy.
And yet, I know all this to be false.
Rage. That is how I feel. Hunger for vengeance.
Yes, I shall unleash my full might. I shall be powerless no more.
I, the slayer of the greatest empires, shall be a scurge to the Gluttonous Undead Lord.
None shall stand in my way.
None shall remain after I have come.
I shall show the undead the true face of death.
